goal: r2_cross(a, a) = a.first * a.second - a.second * a.first
proof: function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real]) { x0.first * x1.second - x0.second * x1.first = r2_cross(x0, x1) }(a, a)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(a.second, a.first)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 + x1 - x1 = x0 }(0, a.first * a.second)

goal: r2_orientation(a, b, b) = r2_cross(r2_sub(b, a), r2_sub(b, a))
proof: function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_cross(r2_sub(x0, x1), r2_sub(x2, x1)) = r2_orientation(x1, x0, x2) }(b, a, b)
r2_cross(r2_sub(b, a), r2_sub(b, a)) != r2_orientation(a, b, b)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, b)

goal: r2_orientation(a, b, c) = r2_cross(u, r2_add(u, v))
proof: function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_cross(r2_sub(x0, x1), r2_sub(x2, x1)) = r2_orientation(x1, x0, x2) }(b, a, c)

goal: r2_cross(u, r2_add(u, v)) = r2_cross(u, u) + r2_cross(u, v)
r2_cross(u, u) + r2_cross(u, v) = r2_cross(u, v)

proof: function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_cross(r2_sub(x0, x1), r2_sub(x2, x1)) = r2_orientation(x1, x0, x2) }(c, b, a)

goal: r2_orientation(b, a, c) = r2_orientation(a, c, b)
r2_orientation(c, b, a) = r2_orientation(b, a, c)

proof: function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, c)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(b, c, a)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, c)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(b, a, c)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(b, a, c)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, c)
r2_collinear(b, a, c) or r2_collinear(a, b, c)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, c)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(c, b, a)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(c, b, a)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, c)
r2_collinear(c, b, a) or r2_collinear(a, b, c)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, c)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(a, c, b)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(a, c, b)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, c)
r2_collinear(a, c, b) or r2_collinear(a, b, c)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) > 0 = r2_left_turn(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, c)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or x0 != x1 }[Real](r2_orientation(a, b, c), 0)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, c)
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) < 0 = r2_right_turn(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, c)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 > x1 = x1 < x0 }[Real](0, r2_orientation(a, b, c))
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or x0 != x1 }[Real](0, r2_orientation(a, b, c))
function(x0: Pair[Real, Real], x1: Pair[Real, Real], x2: Pair[Real, Real]) { r2_orientation(x0, x1, x2) = 0 = r2_collinear(x0, x1, x2) }(a, b, c)
